modal.title: Help
modal.takeTourTitle: Replay the guided walkthrough of the interface
modal.footerMention: Mention someone in chat by typing <1>@username</1> - clickable, opens their active profile.
modal.footerTip: Tip: <1>/help char</1> jumps right here. Press <3>Esc</3> to close.

guides.intro: Plain-language walkthroughs of the site's main features. The Commands tab is the precise reference for every slash command; this tab is the "why and when" behind them.
